forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog. Partly cloudy, with a low around 55. South southwest wind around 2 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 10am. Mostly sunny. High near 85, with temperatures falling to around 83 in the afternoon. South southwest wind 1 to 7 mph.

forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 60. West wind 2 to 7 mph.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Rain Showers
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers after 2pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 84. North wind 1 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Wednesday Night
forecast.shortForecast: Chance Rain Showers then Partly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 52. North northeast wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
